title: cynoglossum pustulatum
intro: Cynoglossum pustulatum, also known as woolly gromwell, is a perennial plant species in the borage family, native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Cynoglossum pustulatum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
